sourcesContent:
export const themes = {
  rose: {
    name: '黑白极简',
    bg: 'bg-white',
    sidebar: 'bg-white/90 backdrop-blur-md border-r border-gray-200',
    avatarRing: 'ring-2 ring-gray-300 ring-offset-2',
    btn: 'bg-white hover:bg-gray-100 text-gray-800 border border-gray-200 rounded-2xl transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:shadow-md',
    btnDownloadNoAnswer: 'bg-gray-50 hover:bg-gray-100 text-gray-800 border border-gray-200 rounded-2xl transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:shadow-md',
    btnDownloadWithAnswer: 'bg-gray-100 hover:bg-gray-200 text-gray-800 border border-gray-300 rounded-2xl transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:shadow-md',
    btnDanger: 'bg-gray-50 hover:bg-red-50 text-red-500 border border-gray-200 rounded-2xl transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:shadow-md',
    sectionTitle: 'text-gray-500',
    textMuted: 'text-gray-400',
    userBubble: 'bg-gray-900 text-white shadow-[0_4px_12px_rgba(0,0,0,0.1)]',
    aiBubble: 'bg-white border border-gray-200 text-gray-800 shadow-[0_4px_12px_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)]',
    input: 'border-gray-300 focus:ring-gray-400',
    sendBtn: 'bg-gray-900 hover:bg-black text-white shadow-[0_4px_12px_rgba(0,0,0,0.2)]',
    themeDot: 'bg-gray-800',
    watermark: 'text-gray-200',
    chatBg: 'bg-white', // 默认纯白背景，下面会用图片覆盖
    chatBgStyle: {
      backgroundImage: `url('/chat-bg.png')`,
      backgroundSize: 'cover',
      backgroundPosition: 'center',
      backgroundRepeat: 'no-repeat',
    },
  },
  aqua: {
    name: '复古酒红',
    bg: 'bg-[#f6f2f3]',
    sidebar: 'bg-white/75 backdrop-blur-md border border-rose-300/40',
    avatarRing: 'ring-2 ring-rose-300/70 ring-offset-2',
    btn: 'bg-rose-50/80 hover:bg-rose-100/80 text-rose-900 border border-rose-200/60 rounded-2xl transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:shadow-md',
    btnDownloadNoAnswer: 'bg-rose-100/70 hover:bg-rose-200/70 text-rose-900 border border-rose-300/60 rounded-2xl transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:shadow-md',
    btnDownloadWithAnswer: 'bg-pink-100/70 hover:bg-pink-200/70 text-pink-900 border border-pink-300/60 rounded-2xl transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:shadow-md',
    btnDanger: 'bg-gray-100/80 hover:bg-red-100/80 text-red-500 border border-gray-200/60 rounded-2xl transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:shadow-md',
    sectionTitle: 'text-rose-600',
    textMuted: 'text-rose-500/70',
    userBubble: 'bg-gradient-to-r from-rose-300 to-pink-200 text-rose-900 shadow-[0_4px_12px_rgba(159,18,57,0.15)]',
    aiBubble: 'bg-white/85 border border-rose-100/60 text-gray-700 shadow-[0_4px_12px_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)]',
    input: 'border-rose-200 focus:ring-rose-300/50',
    sendBtn: 'bg-rose-400 hover:bg-rose-500 text-white shadow-[0_4px_12px_rgba(159,18,57,0.2)]',
    themeDot: 'bg-gradient-to-br from-rose-300 to-pink-300',
    watermark: 'text-rose-400/20',
  },
  warm: {
    name: '森系墨绿',
    bg: 'bg-[#f2f6f4]',
    sidebar: 'bg-white/75 backdrop-blur-md border border-emerald-300/40',
    avatarRing: 'ring-2 ring-emerald-300/70 ring-offset-2',
    btn: 'bg-emerald-50/80 hover:bg-emerald-100/80 text-emerald-900 border border-emerald-200/60 rounded-2xl transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:shadow-md',
    btnDownloadNoAnswer: 'bg-emerald-100/70 hover:bg-emerald-200/70 text-emerald-900 border border-emerald-300/60 rounded-2xl transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:shadow-md',
    btnDownloadWithAnswer: 'bg-teal-100/70 hover:bg-teal-200/70 text-teal-900 border border-teal-300/60 rounded-2xl transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:shadow-md',
    btnDanger: 'bg-gray-100/80 hover:bg-red-100/80 text-red-500 border border-gray-200/60 rounded-2xl transition-all duration-300 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:shadow-md',
    sectionTitle: 'text-emerald-700',
    textMuted: 'text-emerald-600/70',
    userBubble: 'bg-gradient-to-r from-emerald-300 to-teal-200 text-emerald-900 shadow-[0_4px_12px_rgba(4,120,87,0.15)]',
    aiBubble: 'bg-white/85 border border-emerald-100/60 text-gray-700 shadow-[0_4px_12px_rgba(0,0,0,0.04)]',
    input: 'border-emerald-200 focus:ring-emerald-300/50',
    sendBtn: 'bg-emerald-400 hover:bg-emerald-500 text-white shadow-[0_4px_12px_rgba(4,120,87,0.2)]',
    themeDot: 'bg-gradient-to-br from-emerald-300 to-teal-300',
    watermark: 'text-emerald-400/20',
  },
};
